message:
feat(conformance,ufunc): add string-based datetime/timedelta fixture inputs and expand ufunc datetime operations

Extend the datetime differential conformance harness to accept
lhs_strings/rhs_strings fields for constructing datetime64 and
timedelta64 arrays from ISO 8601 string literals instead of raw
numeric values. Add from_datetime_strings and from_timedelta_strings
constructors to UFuncArray. Parse unit-qualified dtype strings like
"datetime64[D]" and "timedelta64[h]" via
parse_datetime_fixture_dtype_with_unit.

Add two new conformance cases: datetime_add_string_inputs_day_unit
(date + timedelta arithmetic with day units) and
datetime_equal_string_inputs_hour_unit (hour-granularity equality
comparison).

Expand UFuncArray with additional datetime comparison, arithmetic,
and formatting operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
